Associate - System Engineer

The Business Analyst plays a key role in ensuring requirements are clearly understood, accurately documented, and traceable throughout the software development lifecycle. This role focuses on translating business and functional inputs into structured, standardized documentation that supports effective development, testing, and delivery. Working closely with business analysts, design teams, and technical stakeholders, the role ensures consistency, clarity, and alignment across all requirement artifacts.

Key Responsibilities

  • Create Software Requirement Specifications (SRS) based on inputs from Core Business Analysts, stakeholder discussions, and requirement walkthroughs
  • Prepare Business Requirement Documents (BRD) using approved templates while ensuring business intent and system behavior are clearly documented
  • Participate in requirement discussions to understand business objectives, functional flows, dependencies, and assumptions before documentation
  • Analyze requirements to identify gaps, ambiguities, and inconsistencies, and work with Core BAs to resolve them
  • Document functional flows, business rules, and acceptance criteria where applicable to support development and QA teams
  • Document wireframes, UI flows, validations, and UI specifications in collaboration with design and product teams
  • Maintain change logs, version history, and document updates throughout the project lifecycle
  • Create and manage traceability matrices linking business, functional, and technical requirements
  • Maintain cross-references across BRD, SRS, UI, API, and related documentation
  • Ensure documentation consistency, completeness, and alignment with approved scope and delivery timelines
  • Ensure accurate and timely PMS updates with structured documentation details
  • Support development, QA, UAT, and audit processes through clear, traceable, and up-to-date documentation
  • Assist in requirement reviews, walkthroughs, and validation sessions with internal and client stakeholders

Required Skills and Experience

  • 1 to 3 years of experience in Business Analysis or related roles
  • Strong experience in BRD and SRS creation
  • Hands-on experience with documentation templates, standards, and version control
  • Ability to document UI wireframes and functional flows clearly
  • Working knowledge of APIs and system integrations for documentation purposes
  • Experience with project management systems and documentation tools
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple documents in parallel
  • Excellent written communication and stakeholder coordination skills

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field
  • 1 to 3 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com

job_description:
Sr. Business Analyst

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Business Analyst function into a world-class, product-minded, clarity-driven team. This role is not a documentation role. It is not a screen updater role. It is not a support role. This is a core Business Analyst position responsible for functional modelling, system reasoning, requirement clarity, and building the foundation for correct development.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead requirement workshops, client calls, and discovery discussions to understand business needs clearly.
  • Ask deeper questions, challenge assumptions, and validate the true business intent behind every requirement.
  • Convert ambiguous client inputs into structured, logical, and actionable functional understanding.
  • Break large features into modules, workflows, components, and clear dependencies.
  • Build strong system-level understanding involving APIs, integrations, data flow, and backend considerations.

job_description:

We are seeking a highly motivated and data-driven User Acquisition Specialist to join our growth team. You will be responsible for managing the entire UA funnel — from campaign conceptualization to in-depth performance analysis — with the goal of acquiring high-quality users at scale and maximizing long-term ROI. This role requires a mix of technical expertise, strategic thinking, analytical rigor, and creative collaboration, making it ideal for someone passionate about scaling mobile games in the social casino space.

Key Responsibilities

1. Technical & Execution

  • Plan, launch, and optimize UA campaigns across Meta (Facebook/Instagram), Google Ads (UAC), TikTok, Apple Search Ads, Unity, and other ad networks/DSPs.
  • Manage daily campaign performance, adjusting bids, budgets, targeting, and creatives to hit CAC, LTV, and ROI goals.
  • Implement structured A/B tests for campaigns, audiences, and creatives.
  • Ensure accurate event configuration and tracking across ad platforms and Mobile Measurement Partners (MMPs) (AppsFlyer).
  • Partner with engineering teams to QA and troubleshoot SDK/event integrations.

2. Analytical & Reporting

  • Analyze campaign and cohort-level data from ad platforms and MMPs to identify trends, opportunities, and risks.
  • Calculate breakeven points and model projected LTV/ROI by user cohorts.
  • Understand and act on player journey metrics (e.g., New users: D0–D7; Retained users: D7+; Reactivated users).
  • Build dashboards and performance reports in tools such as Looker Studio, Tableau, or Power BI.
  • Apply predictive modeling and early KPIs (D0–D3) to forecast long-term user value, for decision making.

3. Strategic

  • Develop and execute a full-funnel UA strategy that integrates acquisition, retention, and re-engagement.
  • Create and manage audience strategies (custom audiences, lookalikes, retargeting cohorts).
  • Design and execute re-engagement campaigns for churned or low-activity users.
  • Collaborate with CRM and product teams to connect UA with retention and monetization strategies.
  • Stay current with platform updates, privacy-first UA (SKAN, ATT, Privacy Sandbox), and emerging ad tech.

4. Creative

  • Collaborate with the creative team to brief, conceptualize, and test ad creatives (video, playables, static, UGC-style).
  • Design and run creative test campaigns with structured methodologies to minimize false positives/false negatives.
  • Analyze creative performance using key metrics (Hook Rate, Hold Rate, CTR, CVR, ROAS etc.) and translate findings into actionable creative insights.
  • Build data-driven audience categories and ensure visual assets + ad copy are tailored to the right segment.
  • Establish creative refresh cycles and rotation strategies to combat ad fatigue.
  • Share business-aligned creative insights with stakeholders, linking creative learnings to broader UA strategy.

5. Collaboration & Operations

  • Act as the primary liaison with ad networks, agencies, and internal cross-functional teams (Analytics, Engineering, Product, Creative).
  • Lead the day-to-day campaign operations, ensuring accuracy, quality, and timeliness.
  • Share insights and recommendations with stakeholders to influence product and marketing decisions.

Qualifications

  • 4+ years of hands-on experience in UA for mobile games (social, hypercasual, or casino preferred).
  • Proven expertise with major ad platforms (Meta, Google Ads, TikTok, ASA).
  • Strong working knowledge of MMPs (AppsFlyer, Adjust, Singular) including event setup and analysis.
  • Deep understanding of UA KPIs (CPI, CAC, ROAS, ROI, LTV, retention).
  • Ability to run re-engagement campaigns and leverage MMP + platform data for targeting and predictive analysis.
  • Proficiency in data analysis & visualization tools (Excel, SQL, Looker Studio, Tableau, or equivalent).
  • Strong analytical, mathematical, and problem-solving skills.
  • Entrepreneurial mindset with a high sense of ownership and accountability.

How to Apply

Send the CV to careersindia@rubyseven.com. If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careersindia@rubyseven.com.
